title: Infosys recognized among 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Ethisphere recognized it as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies. The company said this was its sixth consecutive year receiving the recognition and that it was among a select group of honorees in the Technology industry. The announcement is primarily an ethics and governance recognition, with no financial, operating, strategic, or capital allocation disclosure.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere.
Infosys has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year.
In 2026, 138 honorees were recognized, spanning 17 countries and 40 industries.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys was recognized by Ethisphere among the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies for business integrity, ethics, compliance, and governance programs.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year and is one of only a select group of honorees in  the  Technology  industry.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the recurrence and industry context of the recognition.

important_text_spans.text: In 2026, 138 honorees were recognized, spanning 17 countries and 40 industries.
important_text_spans.reason: Provides the scale of the Ethisphere recognition program for 2026.
